items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-44963 A vulnerability allowing remote code execution RCE on the Backup 
id: e7791183-b588-54ee-9400-89172ff4efa7
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-44963 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44963
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/12
modified: 2026/06/12
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: medium
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-44963 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-12T04:10:08Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-44963", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-44963 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:6550247; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-12, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.

date: 2026/06/12
modified: 2026/06/12
tags:

logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access

items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2025-6440 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-12T04:10:08Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2025-6440", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc

items.title: CVE-2026-11815: An attacker who intercepts and tampers with traffic between the client application and the API Gateway server could pote
items.description: An attacker who intercepts and tampers with traffic between the client application and the API Gateway server could potentially deserialize arbitrary objects. This vulnerability could lead to broken security expectations or remote code execution.

items.title: ZDI-26-356: Apache HTTP Server mod_proxy_ajp Out-Of-Bounds Read Information Disclosure Vulnerability
items.description: This vulnerability allows remote attackers to disclose sensitive information on affected installations of Apache HTTP Server. An attacker must first obtain the ability to compromise an AJP backend associated with the target system in order to exploit this vulnerability. The ZDI has assigned a CVSS rating of 3.7. The following CVEs are assigned: CVE-2026-34032.

items.title: CVE-2026-41721: Spring Data Commons contains a vulnerability that can lead to a Denial of Service (DoS) condition if Spring Data Web Sup
items.description:
Spring Data Commons contains a vulnerability that can lead to a Denial of Service (DoS) condition if Spring Data Web Support is enabled in conjunction with a Controller method using @ProjectedPayload, when an attacker sends a specially crafted HTTP request that causes the application to allocate lots of memory.

Affected versions:
Spring Data Commons 4.0.0 through 4.0.5; 3.5.0 through 3.5.11; 3.4.0 through 3.4.14; 3.3.0 through 3.3.16; 3.2.0 through 3.2.15; 3.1.0 through 3.1.14; 3.0.0 through 3.0.15; 2.7.0 through 2.7.19.

items.title: GeoServer DB2 DataStore Extension has a JNDI Vulnerability via Store Connection
items.description:
## Summary

Administrator can perform JNDI attack through specially crafted DB2 jdbc url leading to Remote Code Execution (RCE).

## Impact

If GeoServer has DB2 extension installed, this vulnerability can lead to executing arbitrary code.

## Details

Authenticated users can access Vector Data Sources page to creating a new data store through db2 jdbc connection, performing JNDI attack due to unrestricted connection parameters, and then achieve RCE with deserialization of untrusted data.

### Remediation

This issue has been fixed in this release: https://github.com/geoserver/geoserver/releases/tag/2.27.0.

## References

* https://osgeo-org.atlassian.net/browse/GEOT-7725
* https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/cve-2023-27867

items.title: Microsoft Teams for Android Vulnerability Allows Attackers to Disclose Sensitive Data
items.description:
Microsoft has disclosed a significant security vulnerability in Microsoft Teams for Android that could allow an authenticated attacker to expose sensitive information over a network. The flaw, tracked as CVE-2026-42835, was officially released on June 9, 2026, and has been rated Important in severity. The vulnerability stems from improper neutralization of special elements in output […]

items.title: CVE-2026-24720: An allocation of resources without limits or throttling vulnerability has been reported to affect File Station 6. If a r
items.description:
An allocation of resources without limits or throttling vulnerability has been reported to affect File Station 6. If a remote attacker gains a user account, they can then exploit the vulnerability to prevent other systems, applications, or processes from accessing the same type of resource.

We have already fixed the vulnerability in the following version:
File Station 5 5.5.6.5243 and later

items.title: CVE-2026-26241: A buffer overflow vulnerability has been reported to affect File Station 5. The remote attackers can then exploit the vu
items.description:
A buffer overflow vulnerability has been reported to affect File Station 5. The remote attackers can then exploit the vulnerability to modify memory or crash processes.

We have already fixed the vulnerability in the following version:
File Station 5 5.5.6.5243 and later

    category: network_connection

items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-26241 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-12T04:10:08Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-26241", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
